expectations.text: File uses CSF3 format with satisfies Meta (no component type parameter)
Tags include 'autodocs' and parameters include layout: 'fullscreen'
All 5 palettes have dedicated stories: neutral, brand, red, amber, green
Each palette story shows all 12 steps (50 through 1000)
Step role annotations present: background range (50-300), border range (400-600), solid range (700-800), text range (900-1000)
ThemeComparison story with data-theme light and dark wrappers
CSS custom property names match source file exactly (e.g. --colors-neutral-50)
No hardcoded hex color values — uses var() references or OKLCH from source
Overview story showing all palettes at a glance
